messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I need some help with a few things from my recent orders. I’d like to exchange the Bicycle I bought for my kid to a larger frame size, and also exchange the Jigsaw Puzzle from the same order—I want one with the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces, and if possible, I’d prefer an animal theme over art. Also, I need to exchange the camera I ordered for one with a slightly lower resolution, but I want to keep the other options the same. Lastly, I want to cancel the skateboard from another order. Can you help me with all of this?
